name: AMES NATIONAL CORP
summary: Ames National Corporation is an Iowa bank holding company owning 100% of six community banks: First National Bank, State Bank & Trust Co., Boone Bank & Trust Co., Reliance State Bank, United Bank & Trust Co., and Iowa State Savings Bank. Operating in central, north-central, and south-central Iowa, the company offers commercial, agricultural, and residential lending, deposit accounts, wealth management, merchant card processing, cash management, safe deposit boxes, wire transfers, and trust services to small-to-medium sized businesses and individuals.
